Harry Potter and the Prince of Slytherin by The Sinister Man reviews
Harry Potter was Sorted into Slytherin after a crappy childhood. His brother Jim is believed to be the BWL. Think you know this story? Think again. Year Four starts on 9/1/20. NO romantic pairings prior to Fourth Year. Basically good Dumbledore and Weasleys. Limited bashing (mainly of James).
Rated: T - English - Adventure/Mystery - Chapters: 171 - Words: 1,509,826 - Reviews: 20410 - Favs: 22,059 - Follows: 23,649 - Updated: Feb 3 - Published: Apr 17, 2015 - Harry P., Hermione G., Neville L., Theodore N.
Harry Potter and Future's Past by DriftWood1965 reviews
Starts out the day after the Battle of Hogwarts. Harry and Hermione meet the Goddess of Love, and she offers to let them go back in time. Strictly Harry and Hermione. Minor - well maybe major Ginny, Ron and Dumbledore Bashing. Soul Bond - Time Travel
Rated: T - English - Romance - Chapters: 43 - Words: 334,128 - Reviews: 9202 - Favs: 20,905 - Follows: 23,619 - Updated: May 6, 2024 - Published: Jan 14, 2010 - Harry P., Hermione G.
Harry Potter and the Methods of Rationality by Less Wrong reviews
Petunia married a biochemist, and Harry grew up reading science and science fiction. Then came the Hogwarts letter, and a world of intriguing new possibilities to exploit. And new friends, like Hermione Granger, and Professor McGonagall, and Professor Quirrell... COMPLETE.
Rated: T - English - Drama/Humor - Chapters: 122 - Words: 661,619 - Reviews: 37646 - Favs: 32,268 - Follows: 23,419 - Updated: Mar 14, 2015 - Published: Feb 28, 2010 - Harry P., Hermione G. - Complete
Discover more
Fanfiction writing tools
Fan Fiction
Harry Potter film props
Harry Crow by RobSt reviews
What will happen when a goblin-raised Harry arrives at Hogwarts. A Harry who has received training, already knows the prophecy and has no scar. With the backing of the goblin nation and Hogwarts herself. Complete.
Rated: T - English - Chapters: 106 - Words: 737,006 - Reviews: 30288 - Favs: 34,926 - Follows: 21,248 - Updated: Jun 8, 2014 - Published: Jun 5, 2012 - [Harry P., Hermione G.] - Complete
Harry Potter: Junior Inquisitor by sprinter1988 reviews
Before the start of fifth year Dumbledore changes the plans. Unfortunately he didn't bother to inform Harry. At his trial, Harry realises that it is down to him to save his own skin. To do so his Slytherin side must come out to play, and once it's out it sticks around turning life at Hogwarts on its head. Warnings: EvilDumbles, SheepOrder/Staff, GoodGuysDontGetEverythingTheirWay
Rated: T - English - Adventure/Drama - Chapters: 37 - Words: 218,697 - Reviews: 9068 - Favs: 17,266 - Follows: 19,907 - Updated: Aug 20, 2016 - Published: Jan 16, 2013 - Harry P., Susan B., Hannah A., Amelia B.
Whiskey Time Travel by Sapper One reviews
When Unspeakable Harry Potter wakes up in 1978, he determines he's either A: In the past. Or B: In a mental hospital. At least the firewhiskey still tastes the same. Waiting tables at the Three Broomsticks, drunken death eater bar fights, annoying an attractive but pushy auror, and avoiding his mother's crush on him is just another day in the life of Harry Potter.
Rated: T - English - Adventure/Humor - Chapters: 6 - Words: 39,211 - Reviews: 2468 - Favs: 15,283 - Follows: 18,737 - Updated: Mar 6, 2022 - Published: May 7, 2015 - Harry P., Amelia B., Nicolas F., Lily Evans P.
His Own Man by Crunchysunrises reviews
In the station between Life and Death Harry makes a different choice. Now he is eleven again, nothing is going the same as before, and people are starting to ask questions, especially the Malfoys, the Hogwarts professors and, most worryingly, Mad-Eye Moody. Harry is beginning to suspect that he might not be up to this Master of Death business and everything that goes along with it.
Rated: T - English - Adventure/Friendship - Chapters: 31 - Words: 147,481 - Reviews: 6010 - Favs: 16,765 - Follows: 18,103 - Updated: Jan 2, 2011 - Published: Oct 19, 2009 - Harry P.
On a Pale Horse by Hyliian reviews
AU. When Dumbledore tried to summon a hero from another world to deal with their Dark Lord problem, this probably wasn't what he had in mind. MoD!Harry, Godlike!Harry, Unhinged!Harry. Dumbledore bashing. DISCONTINUED.
Rated: T - English - Humor/Adventure - Chapters: 25 - Words: 69,349 - Reviews: 5070 - Favs: 16,639 - Follows: 16,832 - Updated: Aug 27, 2017 - Published: Sep 12, 2014 - Harry P. - Complete
To Shape and Change by Blueowl reviews
AU. Time Travel. Snape goes back in time, holding the knowledge of what is to come if he fails. No longer holding a grudge, he seeks to shape Harry into the greatest wizard of all time, starting on the day Hagrid took Harry to Diagon Alley. No Horcruxes.
Rated: T - English - Adventure - Chapters: 34 - Words: 232,332 - Reviews: 10879 - Favs: 29,645 - Follows: 16,563 - Updated: Mar 16, 2014 - Published: Oct 20, 2010 - Harry P., Severus S. - Complete
Discover more
Harry Potter themed
Harry Potter collectibles
Creative writing courses
No Competition by Evilgoddss reviews
What if the horcrux in Harry's scar hadn't quite been as contained by the Blood Wards as Dumbledore planned. Rather than twisting Harry's personality, it darkened his aura. And the dark creatures of the magical world really liked that aura. Gee. Sucks to be a Dark Lord trying to make your comeback. VERY AU. Just for fun.
Rated: T - English - Humor - Chapters: 9 - Words: 69,157 - Reviews: 2767 - Favs: 16,424 - Follows: 15,791 - Updated: Nov 14, 2017 - Published: Mar 20, 2015
A Marauder's Plan by CatsAreCool reviews
Sirius decides to stay in England after escaping Hogwarts and makes protecting Harry his priority. AU GOF.
Rated: T - English - Family/Drama - Chapters: 87 - Words: 893,787 - Reviews: 12566 - Favs: 23,698 - Follows: 15,331 - Updated: Jun 13, 2016 - Published: Apr 21, 2012 - Harry P., Sirius B. - Complete
The Merging by Shaydrall reviews
When the dementor attack presents Harry with an opportunity to begin to fight back he gladly sets himself on the path to have a hand in his future. But as time goes on, it's clear that not all is the same as it once was. Why has his scar stopped hurting? What are these seemingly random objects he's drawn to? How deep does the connection between him and Voldemort truly run? Post GoF
Rated: T - English - Adventure - Chapters: 30 - Words: 427,323 - Reviews: 5840 - Favs: 16,100 - Follows: 15,105 - Updated: Feb 22, 2021 - Published: Sep 28, 2013 - Harry P. - Complete
0800-Rent-A-Hero by brainthief reviews
Magic can solve all the Wizarding World's problems. What's that? A prophecy that insists on a person? Things not quite going your way? I know, lets use this here ritual to summon another! It'll be great! - An eighteen year old Harry is called upon to deal with another dimension's irksome Dark Lord issue. This displeases him. EWE - AU HBP
Rated: T - English - Drama/Adventure - Chapters: 21 - Words: 159,580 - Reviews: 4276 - Favs: 13,393 - Follows: 14,981 - Updated: Dec 24, 2015 - Published: Apr 4, 2015 - Harry P.
Twins: A Different Life by Iikaa15 reviews
When Voldemort attacked he didn't kill Lily and James. When he met his downfall they mistook Harry's twin as the GWL, they send their son away to the Dursleys but he doesn't quite make it in to the Dursley's loving care. Harry will take Hogwarts and his 'family' by storm and by the time the 'light' realize their mistake it will be too late for them to fix. OOC!Dark!Powerful!Harry.
Rated: T - English - Drama/Adventure - Chapters: 34 - Words: 279,274 - Reviews: 5550 - Favs: 14,295 - Follows: 14,902 - Updated: Aug 1, 2020 - Published: Jan 4, 2013 - Harry P., Sirius B., Remus L., Voldemort
Harry Potter and the Game by Concept101 reviews
With his life turned into a Game, Harry now has to raise a Phoenix, uncover the Founders' darkest secrets, deal with political manipulations and live through Hogwarts all while trying desperately to not swear too much.
Rated: T - English - Adventure/Fantasy - Chapters: 45 - Words: 363,393 - Reviews: 7938 - Favs: 12,752 - Follows: 14,616 - Updated: Jul 28, 2018 - Published: May 17, 2016 - Harry P., Hermione G., Ginny W., Albus D.
To Call A Place Home by missmusicluver reviews
Harry won the war. It's months afterwards and unexpectedly, he's literally picked up off the face of the world and shoved into another. One where Harry Potter died a long time ago. Where the Potter family's still fighting a war against a Dark Lord that's ruling the world one muggle murder at a time. They say he's their only hope. Harry doesn't really want in.
Rated: T - English - Adventure/Family - Chapters: 23 - Words: 153,998 - Reviews: 3449 - Favs: 11,599 - Follows: 14,552 - Updated: Oct 3, 2023 - Published: Sep 1, 2013 - Harry P., Sirius B., James P., Lily Evans P.
Harry Potter and the Price of Being Noble by DriftWood1965 reviews
Harry helps Fleur in the second task of GOF and pays the price. HP/Fleur/Gabrielle/Hermione. A Veela bonding fic based on love. T Rated and it will stay that way. Thirteen year old Almost fourteen Gabrielle to start the story. Good Dumbledore.
Rated: T - English - Romance - Chapters: 52 - Words: 406,734 - Reviews: 5506 - Favs: 13,695 - Follows: 14,050 - Updated: Feb 16, 2022 - Published: Sep 27, 2009 - Harry P., Hermione G., Fleur D., Gabrielle D.
A Necessary Gift: A Harry Potter Story by cosette-aimee reviews
The war drags on after Voldemort's defeat and the Order of the Phoenix is fighting a losing battle. When Harry is hit by yet another killing curse, he wakes up years in the past and in an alternate reality. As an unknown child in a foreign world, Harry has a chance to change the outcome of the war - while dealing with new magical talents, pureblood politics and Black family drama.
Rated: T - English - Family/Adventure - Chapters: 26 - Words: 178,578 - Reviews: 4421 - Favs: 12,226 - Follows: 14,015 - Updated: Mar 13, 2016 - Published: Jan 21, 2011 - Harry P., Sirius B.
Oh God Not Again! by Sarah1281 reviews
So maybe everything didn't work out perfectly for Harry. Still, most of his friends survived, he'd gotten married, and was about to become a father. If only he'd have stayed away from the Veil, he wouldn't have had to go back and do everything AGAIN.
Rated: K+ - English - Humor/Parody - Chapters: 50 - Words: 163,659 - Reviews: 17156 - Favs: 31,535 - Follows: 13,808 - Updated: Dec 23, 2009 - Published: Sep 13, 2008 - Harry P. - Complete
Poison Pen by GenkaiFan reviews
Harry has had enough of seeing his reputation shredded in the Daily Prophet and decides to do something about it. Only he decides to embrace his Slytherin side to rectify matters.
Rated: T - English - Drama/Humor - Chapters: 32 - Words: 74,506 - Reviews: 10354 - Favs: 32,354 - Follows: 13,380 - Updated: Jun 21, 2010 - Published: Dec 3, 2009 - Harry P. - Complete
Champions by Thor's Shadow reviews
Harry takes a moment to help another Champion during the Second Task, and the unexpected aftermath forever changes his life.
Rated: T - English - Adventure/Romance - Chapters: 48 - Words: 187,899 - Reviews: 5452 - Favs: 16,690 - Follows: 13,357 - Updated: Feb 9, 2022 - Published: Jul 25, 2010 - [Harry P., Fleur D.] - Complete
Basilisk-born by Ebenbild reviews
What if the Dementor attack in 5th year had ended with Harry losing? What if someone had stepped in to save him? And what if Harry ended up in the past with a chance to be more than he ever was before? A story about a forcibly time travelled Harry and its consequences... Manipulative Dumbledore, 'Slytherin!Harry', Time Travel!
Rated: T - English - Mystery/Adventure - Chapters: 72 - Words: 630,949 - Reviews: 8113 - Favs: 15,070 - Follows: 12,790 - Updated: Mar 26, 2021 - Published: Sep 22, 2014 - Harry P., Salazar S. - Complete
Dear Order by SilverWolf7007 reviews
"I'm still alive, as you may surmise from this note. Of course, I could be dead and someone is faking the letter to fool you…" Harry is NOT happy about being left at Privet Drive all summer with no one to talk to.
Rated: K+ - English - Humor - Chapters: 22 - Words: 29,689 - Reviews: 7355 - Favs: 16,929 - Follows: 12,484 - Updated: Sep 19, 2016 - Published: Sep 17, 2006 - Harry P., Hermione G., Luna L. - Complete
The Well Groomed Mind by Lady Khali reviews
On Halloween 1994, Harry learns his mind isn't his own. On Samhain morn, he vows to question everything. Armed with logic and an unlikely ally, Harry makes a last ditch bid to reclaim his life. The goal: survive at all costs.
Rated: T - English - Drama - Chapters: 30 - Words: 193,050 - Reviews: 4573 - Favs: 11,684 - Follows: 12,374 - Updated: Dec 30, 2017 - Published: May 30, 2012 - Harry P.
Delenda Est by Lord Silvere reviews
Harry is a prisoner, and Bellatrix has fallen from grace. The accidental activation of Bella's treasured heirloom results in another chance for Harry. It also gives him the opportunity to make the acquaintance of the young and enigmatic Bellatrix Black as they change the course of history.
Rated: T - English - Chapters: 46 - Words: 392,449 - Reviews: 8325 - Favs: 20,236 - Follows: 12,082 - Updated: Sep 22, 2013 - Published: Nov 15, 2009 - Harry P., Bellatrix L. - Complete
